name: Classic Pancakes
description: Fluffy homemade pancakes perfect for a weekend breakfast
instructions: Mix dry ingredients in a large bowl
Whisk together eggs, milk, and melted butter
Combine wet and dry ingredients until just mixed
Heat a griddle or pan over medium heat
Pour batter and cook until bubbles form
Flip and cook until golden brown

name: Chicken Caesar Salad
description: Fresh romaine lettuce with grilled chicken and classic Caesar dressing
instructions: Season and grill chicken breast until cooked through
Chop romaine lettuce and place in a large bowl
Slice cooked chicken into strips
Add croutons and parmesan cheese
Drizzle with Caesar dressing and toss
Serve immediately with extra parmesan

name: Spaghetti Carbonara
description: Classic Italian pasta with creamy egg sauce and crispy bacon
instructions: Cook spaghetti according to package directions
Fry bacon until crispy, then chop
Beat eggs with parmesan cheese and black pepper
Drain pasta, reserving some pasta water
Toss hot pasta with bacon and remove from heat
Quickly stir in egg mixture, adding pasta water to create creamy sauce

name: Avocado Toast
description: Simple and nutritious toast topped with smashed avocado
instructions: Toast bread until golden brown
Mash avocado with lemon juice, salt, and pepper
Spread avocado mixture on toast
Drizzle with olive oil
Sprinkle with red pepper flakes
Serve immediately

name: Beef Tacos
description: Savory ground beef tacos with fresh toppings
instructions: Brown ground beef in a skillet
Add taco seasoning and water, simmer
Warm taco shells in oven
Chop lettuce, tomatoes, and onions
Fill taco shells with seasoned beef
Top with lettuce, tomatoes, cheese, and sour cream

name: Greek Yogurt Parfait
description: Layered yogurt with granola and fresh berries
instructions: Mix greek yogurt with vanilla extract
Wash and slice strawberries
In a glass, layer yogurt at the bottom
Add a layer of granola
Add berries on top
Drizzle with honey and serve

name: Chicken Stir Fry
description: Quick Asian-style stir fry with tender chicken and vegetables
instructions: Cut chicken into bite-sized pieces
Chop all vegetables
Heat sesame oil in a wok or large pan
Stir fry chicken until cooked through
Add vegetables and stir fry for 3-4 minutes
Add soy sauce, garlic, and ginger, toss well
Serve over cooked rice

name: Caprese Salad
description: Fresh mozzarella, tomatoes, and basil with balsamic glaze
instructions: Slice tomatoes and mozzarella into rounds
Arrange alternating slices on a plate
Tuck fresh basil leaves between slices
Drizzle with olive oil and balsamic vinegar
Season with salt and pepper
Serve immediately

name: Banana Smoothie
description: Creamy and refreshing banana smoothie
instructions: Peel and slice bananas
Add all ingredients to a blender
Blend until smooth and creamy
Add more ice if desired thickness
Pour into glasses
Serve immediately

name: Grilled Salmon
description: Perfectly grilled salmon with herbs and lemon
instructions: Preheat grill to medium-high heat
Season salmon with salt, pepper, and minced garlic
Drizzle with olive oil
Place salmon skin-side down on grill
Grill for 4-5 minutes per side
Top with fresh dill and lemon juice before serving

name: Veggie Burger
description: Hearty vegetarian burger with black beans and vegetables
instructions: Mash black beans in a bowl
Dice onion, bell pepper, and garlic finely
Mix beans with vegetables, bread crumbs, and cumin
Form into patties
Cook on a griddle or pan for 4-5 minutes per side
Serve on buns with lettuce and tomato

name: French Toast
description: Classic French toast with cinnamon and maple syrup
instructions: Whisk together eggs, milk, cinnamon, and vanilla
Dip bread slices in egg mixture
Melt butter in a pan over medium heat
Cook bread slices until golden on both sides
Dust with powdered sugar
Serve with maple syrup

name: Margherita Pizza
description: Classic Italian pizza with tomato, mozzarella, and basil
instructions: Preheat oven to 475°F (245°C)
Roll out pizza dough on a floured surface
Spread tomato sauce evenly
Add sliced mozzarella cheese
Bake for 12-15 minutes until crust is golden
Top with fresh basil and drizzle with olive oil

name: Hummus with Veggies
description: Creamy homemade hummus with fresh vegetable sticks
instructions: Blend chickpeas, tahini, lemon juice, and garlic
Add olive oil and cumin while blending
Adjust consistency with water if needed
Cut vegetables into sticks
Transfer hummus to a bowl
Serve with vegetable sticks for dipping

name: Beef Lasagna
description: Layered pasta bake with beef, cheese, and rich tomato sauce
instructions: Cook lasagna noodles according to package directions
Brown ground beef with onion and garlic
Add tomato sauce, basil, and oregano to meat
Mix ricotta with egg and parmesan
Layer noodles, meat sauce, ricotta mixture, and mozzarella
Bake at 375°F for 45 minutes until bubbly

name: Chocolate Chip Cookies
description: Classic homemade chocolate chip cookies
instructions: Preheat oven to 375°F (190°C)
Cream butter with both sugars
Beat in eggs and vanilla
Mix in flour, baking soda, and salt
Fold in chocolate chips
Drop spoonfuls on baking sheet and bake 10-12 minutes

name: Tom Yum Soup
description: Spicy and sour Thai soup with shrimp
instructions: Bring water to boil with lemongrass and galangal
Add mushrooms and tomatoes
Add shrimp and cook until pink
Season with fish sauce and chili paste
Add lime juice
Garnish with cilantro and serve hot

name: Quinoa Bowl
description: Healthy grain bowl with roasted vegetables and tahini dressing
instructions: Cook quinoa according to package directions
Roast chickpeas and cubed sweet potato at 400°F
Massage kale with olive oil and lemon
Make tahini dressing with lemon and garlic
Assemble bowl with quinoa as base
Top with roasted vegetables, kale, avocado, and dressing

name: Eggs Benedict
description: Classic brunch dish with poached eggs and hollandaise sauce
instructions: Make hollandaise: whisk egg yolks with lemon juice over double boiler
Slowly add melted butter while whisking
Season hollandaise with salt and cayenne
Poach eggs in simmering water with vinegar
Toast English muffins and warm Canadian bacon
Assemble: muffin, bacon, poached egg, hollandaise

name: Peanut Butter Energy Balls
description: No-bake energy balls perfect for a quick snack
instructions: Mix peanut butter and honey in a bowl
Add oats, chocolate chips, and chia seeds
Add vanilla extract and a pinch of salt
Mix until well combined
Roll into small balls
Refrigerate for at least 30 minutes before serving

name: Pad Thai
description: Thai stir-fried noodles with shrimp and peanuts
instructions: Soak rice noodles in warm water until soft
Make sauce with fish sauce, tamarind, and sugar
Stir fry garlic and shrimp
Push to side, scramble eggs
Add noodles and sauce, toss well
Top with bean sprouts, peanuts, lime, and green onions

name: Chicken Quesadilla
description: Crispy tortilla filled with chicken and melted cheese
instructions: Cook and shred chicken breast
Sauté bell peppers and onions
Season chicken with cumin and chili powder
Place cheese and chicken on half of tortilla
Fold and cook in pan until cheese melts
Serve with sour cream and salsa

name: Mushroom Risotto
description: Creamy Italian rice dish with mushrooms
instructions: Sauté onions and garlic in butter
Add arborio rice and toast for 2 minutes
Add white wine and stir until absorbed
Gradually add warm broth, stirring constantly
Sauté mushrooms separately with thyme
Stir in mushrooms, butter, and parmesan before serving

name: Acai Bowl
description: Refreshing smoothie bowl topped with fresh fruits and granola
instructions: Blend acai puree with banana and almond milk
Pour into a bowl
Top with sliced strawberries and blueberries
Add granola and coconut flakes
Drizzle with honey
Serve immediately

name: BBQ Pulled Pork
description: Slow-cooked tender pork in smoky BBQ sauce
instructions: Season pork shoulder with spices
Cook in slow cooker on low for 8 hours
Shred pork with two forks
Mix with BBQ sauce
Toast burger buns
Serve pulled pork on buns topped with coleslaw

name: Bruschetta
description: Toasted bread topped with fresh tomatoes and basil
instructions: Slice baguette diagonally
Toast bread slices until golden
Dice tomatoes and mix with chopped basil
Add minced garlic, olive oil, and balsamic
Season with salt and pepper
Spoon tomato mixture onto toasted bread

name: Teriyaki Chicken Bowl
description: Japanese-inspired rice bowl with glazed chicken
instructions: Make teriyaki sauce with soy sauce, mirin, and brown sugar
Marinate chicken in half the sauce
Cook rice according to package directions
Pan-fry chicken until cooked through
Steam broccoli until tender
Serve chicken over rice with broccoli, drizzle remaining sauce, and garnish

name: Spinach Artichoke Dip
description: Creamy hot dip perfect for parties
instructions: Preheat oven to 350°F (175°C)
Mix cream cheese, sour cream, and minced garlic
Chop spinach and artichoke hearts
Fold in vegetables and half the cheeses
Transfer to baking dish and top with remaining cheese
Bake for 25 minutes until bubbly, serve with chips

name: Shrimp Scampi
description: Garlicky shrimp in white wine butter sauce over pasta
instructions: Cook linguine according to package directions
Sauté garlic in butter and olive oil
Add shrimp and cook until pink
Add white wine and red pepper flakes
Add lemon juice and fresh parsley
Toss with cooked pasta and serve

name: Overnight Oats
description: Make-ahead breakfast with oats, milk, and toppings
instructions: Mix oats, milk, yogurt, and chia seeds in a jar
Add honey and cinnamon
Stir well to combine
Cover and refrigerate overnight
In the morning, top with sliced banana and berries
Add a dollop of almond butter and enjoy cold
